sqlMap.select: select * from propertyversion where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select propertyversionno, versionname, seq, metaobjectno, structureno from propertyversion where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update propertyversion set
versionname = #versionname# versionname = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from propertyversion where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from propertyversion where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select propertyversionno, versionname, seq, metaobjectno, structureno from propertyversion where propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, versionname from propertyversion where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
